summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of trading chart application control buttons and view modes. All major functionality working correctly with one minor issue regarding UNKNOWN/neutral badge display.

ui_bugs.issue: UNKNOWN/neutral badges are being displayed when they should be hidden
ui_bugs.details: Found 1 UNKNOWN badge and 9 neutral badges on the page. According to requirements, UNKNOWN/Bias:neutral badges should NOT be displayed

passed_tests: ViewModes functionality - Auto mode works correctly
ViewModes functionality - Classic TA mode shows indicators, patterns, Fibonacci
ViewModes functionality - Smart Money mode shows POI, Liquidity, CHOCH elements
ViewModes functionality - Minimal mode shows only essential elements
Indicators selector opens and allows EMA/RSI/MACD selection
Fibonacci overlay button toggles Fibonacci levels on chart
Pattern overlay button shows pattern detection card
Setup overlay button displays trade setup information
Timeframe switching between 1D and 4H works correctly
Chart renders correctly with all overlays
All control buttons are clickable and responsive
Visual feedback for active/inactive states of buttons
Chart updates correctly when switching modes
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix MarketStateRenderer component to hide UNKNOWN and neutral trend badges. The component should not display badges when trend_direction is 'unknown' or 'neutral' to comply with requirements.
